findings.classic_observation: The selected classic report contains 41,286 review characters and preserves full context.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit contains 6,079 review characters and is faster to scan.
findings.required_fix: Keep the cockpit concise while retaining the selected classic report as the evidence layer.

findings.classic_observation: The classic report is intentionally information-dense.
findings.required_fix: Preserve the lower-density front-page role; do not move audit tables into the cockpit.

findings.classic_observation: The classic report remains report-led and section-dense.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit uses a masthead, decision cards, performance metrics and a separate discipline block.

findings.classic_observation: The classic decision cockpit includes the executed action and an explicit next-action trigger: True.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit decision surface is aligned with the classic report.

findings.classic_observation: The classic report names the guarded URNM-to-XBI rotation and the consumed rotation budget.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit names each executed direction and shows the pre/post weights.
findings.required_fix: Keep the runtime-derived bilingual action contract.

findings.classic_observation: The classic report and runtime state identify SMH as the largest position and preserve current post-execution weights.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit shows SMH at 28.1% and the current executed transitions.

findings.classic_observation: The classic report records NAV 110224.86 EUR and since-inception return 10.22%.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit displays €110,225 and +10.2% with the current largest-position risk.
findings.required_fix: Keep NAV and return derived from runtime state plus valuation history.

findings.classic_observation: The classic report keeps the full pricing, holdings and audit context.
findings.cockpit_observation: The WP07 provenance strip now exposes runtime state, pricing audit, run manifest, no-delivery and no-promotion status.
findings.required_fix: Treat the WP07 provenance requirement as closed; preserve the visible evidence strip.

findings.classic_observation: The English and Dutch classic reports are companion surfaces from the same report state.
findings.cockpit_observation: English and Dutch cockpit surfaces are semantically parallel.

findings.classic_observation: The classic report is client-grade but text-heavy.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit presents a coherent premium entry surface.

findings.classic_observation: The selected current classic markdown remains the complete audit and rationale layer.
findings.cockpit_observation: The cockpit is additive, references the authority artifacts and does not replace the classic report.
findings.required_fix: Preserve the classic report and current provenance references.
